I

IAgentAdminConnection - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Service for administering server clusters and infobases of the 1C:Enterprise 8 platform.
IAgentAdminConnector - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.client
Interface of the object that is used for establishing connections with the 1C:Enterprise 8 administration server
IAgentAdminConnectorFactory - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.client
Interface of the factory for creating objects that are used for establishing connections with the 1C:Enterprise administration server
IAssignmentRuleInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Assignment rule description interface
IClusterInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
1C:Enterprise server cluster description interface
IClusterManagerInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Cluster manager description interface
IClusterServiceInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Cluster service description interface
IInfoBaseConnectionInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of the description of connection between a client application and an infobase
IInfoBaseConnectionShort - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Short connection description interface
IInfoBaseInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
1C:Enterprise infobase description interface
IInfoBaseInfoShort - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Short infobase description interface
ILicenseInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
License description interface
InfoBaseInfo - Class in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Infobase description
InfoBaseInfo() - Constructor for class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.InfoBaseInfo
Constructor of a new infobase description
InfoBaseInfo(int) - Constructor for class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.InfoBaseInfo
Constructor of a new infobase description
InfoBaseInfo(UUID, int) - Constructor for class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.InfoBaseInfo
Constructor of an existing infobase description
InfoBaseInfoShort - Class in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Short infobase description
InfoBaseInfoShort(UUID) - Constructor for class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.InfoBaseInfoShort
Constructor of a short description of an existing infobase
interruptCurrentServerCall(UUID, UUID, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Interrupt current server call.
IObjectLockInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Object lock description interface
IPortRangeInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of the working server IP port range
IRegUserInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of the description of a central server administrator or a server cluster administrator

Interface of resource counter description of 1C:Enterprise server cluster
IResourceConsumptionCounterValue - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of resource value description of 1C:Enterprise server cluster
IResourceConsumptionLimit - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of resource limit description of 1C:Enterprise server cluster

Gets flag that show to analyze active session count

isAnalyzeCalls() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IResourceConsumptionCounter
Gets flag that show to analyze call count
isAnalyzeCalls() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ResourceConsumptionCounter
 
isAnalyzeCpuTime() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IResourceConsumptionCounter
Sets flag that show to analyze cpu time
isAnalyzeCpuTime() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ResourceConsumptionCounter
 
isAnalyzeDbmsBytes() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IResourceConsumptionCounter
Gets flag that show to analyze DBMS bytes

isAnalyzeDuration() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IResourceConsumptionCounter
Gets flag that show to analyze call duration
isAnalyzeDuration() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ResourceConsumptionCounter
 
isAnalyzeDurationDbms() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IResourceConsumptionCounter
Gets flag that show to analyze duration call DBMS
isAnalyzeDurationDbms() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ResourceConsumptionCounter

Gets flag that show to analyze call service duration
isAnalyzeDurationService() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ResourceConsumptionCounter
 
isAnalyzeMemory() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IResourceConsumptionCounter
Gets flag that show to analyze memory
isAnalyzeMemory() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ResourceConsumptionCounter
 
isAnalyzeReadBytes() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IResourceConsumptionCounter
Gets flag that show to analyze disk read operation
isAnalyzeReadBytes() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ResourceConsumptionCounter

Gets flag that show to analyze session count

isAnalyzeWriteBytes() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ResourceConsumptionCounter
 
isClusterRecyclingKillByMemoryWithDump() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ClusterInfo
 
isClusterRecyclingKillByMemoryWithDump() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IClusterInfo
Returns whether dump should be created for processes exceeded memory limit during termination
isClusterRecyclingKillProblemProcesses() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ClusterInfo
 
isClusterRecyclingKillProblemProcesses() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IClusterInfo
Returns whether processes with errors should be force terminated.
isDedicatedManagers() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IWorkingServerInfo
Gets the flag that shows whether dedicated managers are used for each service
isDedicatedManagers() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.WorkingServerInfo
 
ISecurityProfile - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of security profile description of 1C:Enterprise server cluster
ISecurityProfileAddIn - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of description of an allowed add-in of a security profile of 1C:Enterprise server cluster
ISecurityProfileApplication - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of description of an allowed application of a security profile of 1C:Enterprise server cluster
ISecurityProfileCOMClass - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of description of an allowed COM class of a security profile of 1C:Enterprise server cluster
ISecurityProfileExternalModule - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of description of an allowed external module of a security profile of 1C:Enterprise server cluster
ISecurityProfileInternetResource - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of description of an allowed Internet resource of a security profile of 1C:Enterprise server cluster
ISecurityProfileVirtualDirectory - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Interface of description of an allowed virtual directory of a security profile of 1C:Enterprise server cluster
isEnable() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IWorkingProcessInfo
Gets the flag that is set by a cluster when starting or stopping a working process is required
ISessionInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Infobase session description interface
isIssuedByServer() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ILicenseInfo
Shows whether the license is obtained by 1C:Enterprise server and granted to a client application
isMainServer() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IWorkingServerInfo
Gets the flag that shows whether the server is central
isMainServer() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.WorkingServerInfo
 
isNet() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ILicenseInfo
Shows whether the software protection key is a network one.
isPasswordAuthAllowed() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IRegUserInfo
Gets the flag that shows whether password authentication is allowed for the administrator
isPasswordAuthAllowed() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.RegUserInfo
 
isReserve() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IWorkingProcessInfo
Gets the flag flag indicating that working process is reserve
isScheduledJobsDenied() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IInfoBaseInfo
Gets the flag that shows whether execution of infobase scheduled jobs is denied
isScheduledJobsDenied() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.InfoBaseInfo
 
isSessionsDenied() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IInfoBaseInfo
Gets the flag that shows whether the session is locked
isSessionsDenied() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.InfoBaseInfo
 
isSysAuthAllowed() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IRegUserInfo
Gets the flag that shows whether operating system authentication is allowed for the administrator
isSysAuthAllowed() - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.RegUserInfo
 
IWorkingProcessInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Working process description interface
IWorkingServerInfo - Interface in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
